title: Visiting Hours Weekdays
text: General visiting hours are Monday to Friday from 10:00 AM to 7:00 PM. ICU visitation is restricted to approved family windows.

title: Visiting Hours Weekends
text: Weekend visiting hours are from 10:00 AM to 6:00 PM. Visitor passes are required at reception.

title: ICU Visitor Policy
text: Only one visitor at a time is allowed in ICU during designated slots. Children below 12 are not permitted in ICU areas.

title: Billing Payment Methods
text: Hospital billing accepts credit cards, debit cards, UPI, net banking, and cash payments at billing counters.

title: Insurance Cashless Eligibility
text: Cashless insurance is available only for empaneled insurers after pre-authorization approval and valid policy verification.

title: Refund Timeline
text: Approved refunds are processed within 7 to 10 business days to the original payment method.

title: Appointment Reschedule Policy
text: Appointments can be rescheduled up to 4 hours before slot time through support or patient portal.

title: Appointment Cancellation Policy
text: Appointments canceled at least 4 hours in advance are eligible for full consultation fee reversal as per policy.

title: Lab Report Availability
text: Most routine lab reports are available within 24 hours and can be downloaded from the patient portal.

title: Emergency Contact
text: For emergencies like severe bleeding, chest pain, or breathing difficulty, contact emergency desk immediately or call local emergency services.

title: Pharmacy Timings
text: In-house pharmacy is open 24x7 for admitted patients and emergency prescriptions.

title: Cafeteria Timings
text: Cafeteria is open from 7:00 AM to 10:00 PM daily. ICU waiting lounge has separate vending access.

title: Parking Information
text: Paid visitor parking is available in basement levels B1 and B2, subject to slot availability.

title: Discharge Billing Process
text: Discharge is initiated after physician clearance and final bill settlement. TPA clearance may increase processing time.

title: OPD Registration Requirement
text: First-time OPD patients must carry a valid photo ID for registration and UHID creation.

title: Teleconsultation Availability
text: Teleconsultation is available for select departments and follow-up visits based on doctor availability.

title: Medical Record Request
text: Medical records can be requested through records desk or portal, usually shared within 3 working days.

title: Insurance Documents Required
text: Cashless insurance requests generally require policy card, photo ID, doctor note, and signed pre-authorization form.

title: No-Show Appointment Rule
text: No-show appointments may require rebooking and can be subject to consultation fee policy.

title: Blood Test Fasting Rule
text: For fasting glucose or lipid tests, 8 to 12 hours fasting is typically required unless instructed otherwise by the doctor.

title: Billing Helpdesk Hours
text: Billing support desk is available from 8:00 AM to 8:00 PM on all days for payment and invoice help.

title: Report Correction Process
text: If report demographics are incorrect, contact lab support with UHID and sample date for correction request.

title: International Card Payments
text: International card acceptance depends on bank authorization and card network support at point of payment.

title: Second Opinion Process
text: Patients can request a second opinion appointment by sharing prior reports and selecting specialist department.

title: Payment Failed UPI Timeout
text: Ticket resolved by verifying transaction ID and confirming bank-side timeout. Patient advised to wait 30 minutes before retry.

title: Payment Debited Bill Unpaid
text: Billing team reconciled delayed payment callback and manually marked invoice as paid after gateway settlement confirmation.

title: Duplicate Payment Refund
text: Patient paid twice for same OPD invoice. One payment retained, duplicate transaction moved to refund queue.

title: Card Declined at Counter
text: Issue resolved by offering alternate payment mode and advising customer to contact issuing bank for decline reason.

title: Insurance Preauth Pending
text: Support requested additional documents and informed patient that cashless approval remains pending insurer response.

title: Partial Insurance Denial
text: Patient informed that non-payable consumables and exclusions are billed separately as per policy terms.

title: Invoice Name Correction
text: Billing updated invoice name after ID verification and reissued corrected digital invoice within same day.

title: Refund Delay Escalation
text: Finance confirmed refund in process and shared expected settlement date within 10 business days.

title: POS Machine Network Error
text: Temporary network issue at billing counter. Patient redirected to online payment link and receipt generated instantly.

title: EMI Request for Surgery Bill
text: Patient guided to approved financing partner desk; EMI eligibility subject to bank and partner verification.

title: Appointment Slot Not Visible
text: Portal cache issue resolved by refreshing doctor roster. New slots reflected after system sync.

title: Appointment Booked Wrong Department
text: Support canceled incorrect booking and rebooked in requested specialty with same-day nearest slot.

title: Doctor On Leave Reschedule
text: Auto-reschedule offered with options in next 48 hours and patient selected alternate consultant.

title: Follow-Up Booking Discount Missing
text: Follow-up concession applied manually after validating prior visit date within allowed follow-up window.

title: Teleconsult Link Not Received
text: Consult link resent to registered mobile and email; patient advised to join 10 minutes before schedule.

title: Late Arrival Appointment Hold
text: Grace period communicated as 15 minutes; patient accommodated in waiting list for next available turn.

title: No Confirmation SMS
text: SMS gateway retry triggered; booking remained confirmed in portal despite delayed text notification.

title: Double Appointment Created
text: Duplicate booking canceled without charge and original preferred slot kept active.

title: Portal Login for Appointment Failed
text: Account unlocked after OTP verification and user completed appointment booking successfully.

title: Family Member Booking Help
text: Patient added dependent profile and completed pediatric appointment through same mobile number.

title: Refund for Canceled OPD Visit
text: Cancellation within allowed window approved for full consultation refund to original payment source.

title: Refund Against Lab Cancellation
text: Lab test canceled before sample collection; refund initiated and reference ID shared.

title: Package Refund Pro-Rata Clarification
text: Unused package components refunded as per package terms after deduction of consumed services.

title: Refund to Closed Bank Account
text: Finance requested alternate account details and supporting proof to process manual NEFT refund.

title: Wallet Refund Request
text: Refund destination cannot be changed after capture; amount credited to original source as per policy.

title: Incomplete Refund Amount
text: Support explained deductions for consumed consultation and convenience fee under refund rules.

title: Refund Status Not Updated
text: Status updated after nightly reconciliation batch; patient notified with transaction ARN.

title: Cash Refund Request
text: Cash refund permitted only for cash transactions with original receipt and valid ID proof.

title: TPA Settlement Difference
text: Billing explained final payable after insurer non-medical deductions and room rent capping.

title: Emergency Deposit Refund
text: Unused emergency deposit moved to refund queue post discharge clearance and final bill closure.

title: Lab Report Delay CBC
text: CBC analyzer downtime caused delay; report delivered with apology and revised timeline communication.

title: Lab Report Not Downloading
text: Issue fixed by regenerating signed PDF; patient received report link via SMS.

title: Incorrect Age on Lab Report
text: Demographic correction completed and amended report issued after identity validation.

title: Sample Recollection Request
text: Sample quality insufficient; recollection scheduled at no additional cost.

title: Home Collection Missed
text: Home collection reassigned and priority visit arranged for next available window.

title: Fasting Requirement Not Communicated
text: Patient informed of 8 to 12 hour fasting requirement and test rescheduled.

title: Lab Value Explanation Request
text: Support provided plain-language explanation with reminder to consult treating doctor for diagnosis.

title: Report Shared to Wrong Email
text: Access revoked and report resent to verified email after security confirmation.

title: Critical Value Callback Missed
text: Lab repeated callback and informed primary consultant as per critical alert protocol.

title: Reference Range Clarification
text: Patient informed reference ranges can vary by lab method and age/sex profile.

title: Insurance Card Not Recognized
text: Insurer code mismatch corrected by TPA desk and eligibility rechecked.

title: Policy Expired During Admission
text: Cashless request denied due to expiry date; patient advised reimbursement route if applicable.

title: Copay Percentage Confusion
text: Support explained policy copay terms and shared insurer statement details.

title: Room Upgrade Insurance Impact
text: Patient informed that room-category upgrade may lead to proportionate deduction in claim.

title: Preexisting Disease Query
text: Coverage for preexisting conditions depends on waiting period and policy terms from insurer.

title: Network Hospital Verification
text: TPA desk confirmed network status using insurer portal and policy number.

title: Claim Document Checklist
text: Patient provided checklist including discharge summary, itemized bill, prescriptions, and test reports.

title: Insurance Approval Delay
text: Turnaround depends on insurer response; provisional estimate shared while waiting for approval.

title: Cashless to Reimbursement Shift
text: When cashless is not approved, patient can proceed and later file reimbursement with insurer.

title: Maternity Coverage Exclusion
text: Maternity coverage applied only if add-on and waiting period criteria are met.

title: Visitor Pass Lost
text: Replacement pass issued after identity verification at reception desk.

title: After-Hours Entry Request
text: After-hours entry requires nursing station approval and security clearance.

title: Parking Fee Dispute
text: Parking logs checked and excess charge reversed by facilities team.

title: Wheelchair Support Delay
text: Transport desk assigned attendant and escalated delay incident for service improvement.

title: Pharmacy Stock Out
text: Alternative brand suggested by pharmacist and restock ETA shared.

title: Cafeteria Food Complaint
text: Complaint logged with catering partner and replacement meal provided.

title: Housekeeping Delay
text: Service request prioritized and resolved with supervisory follow-up.

title: AC Not Working in Room
text: Engineering inspected unit and shifted patient to alternate room until fix.

title: Nurse Call Bell Issue
text: Biomedical team replaced faulty bell panel and verified response workflow.

title: Discharge Summary Delay
text: Doctor sign-off pending was expedited; summary shared before final bill settlement.

title: Portal Password Reset Failure
text: User identity revalidated and reset link regenerated successfully.

title: OTP Not Received
text: OTP delivery retried via alternate SMS route and voice OTP backup enabled.

title: App Crash During Payment
text: Issue traced to outdated app version; user updated app and completed payment.

title: Wrong UHID Linked
text: Data correction performed after verification and records linked to correct patient profile.

title: Digital Invoice Missing GST
text: GST-compliant invoice regenerated and shared with registered email.

title: Consultation Receipt Not Found
text: Receipt recovered from archive and attached to patient portal.

title: Wrong Mobile Number on Account
text: Mobile number updated after OTP to old number and identity cross-check.

title: Email Update Request
text: Email updated post verification; patient asked to re-login for sync.

title: Doctor Changed Last Minute
text: Backup consultant assigned and patient informed before consultation start.

title: Consultation Waiting Time Long
text: Queue delay communicated with revised ETA and option to reschedule without penalty.

title: Pediatric Slot Unavailable
text: Patient placed on priority waitlist and notified on cancellation availability.

title: Radiology Queue Delay
text: Scan delayed due to emergency case prioritization; new slot allocated same day.

title: CT Contrast Consent Confusion
text: Radiology team re-explained consent process and completed scan after approval.

title: Sample Collection Billing Mismatch
text: Home-collection charge corrected as per package inclusion and revised invoice issued.

title: Advance Deposit Not Reflected
text: Deposit tagged to admission file after reconciliation and displayed on bill statement.

title: Missing Discharge Medications
text: Pharmacy quickly completed discharge pack and nursing team confirmed handover.

title: Bed Transfer Request
text: Room transfer approved subject to availability and billing category update.

title: Ambulance Booking Delay
text: Transport team assigned nearest available ambulance and shared ETA.

title: Emergency Queue Clarification
text: Emergency triage prioritizes clinical urgency over arrival sequence.

title: Blood Bank Availability Query
text: Availability confirmed by blood bank desk; replacement donor policy explained.

title: Lab Add-On Test Request
text: Add-on test allowed only if sample stability window remains valid.

title: Follow-Up Prescription Copy
text: Digital prescription copy shared through portal after doctor verification.

title: Online Payment Link Expired
text: New secure payment link generated and prior link invalidated for safety.

title: Noisy Ward Complaint
text: Ward staff intervened and quiet-hours policy reinforced to attendants.

title: Low Hemoglobin Symptoms
text: Low hemoglobin can be associated with fatigue, weakness, pale skin, and dizziness. Clinical diagnosis requires doctor evaluation.

title: Persistent Fever Guidance
text: If fever lasts more than 3 days or worsens, consult a doctor for in-person assessment.

title: Chest Pain Safety
text: Chest pain or pressure can be serious. Seek immediate emergency medical attention.

title: Breathing Difficulty Safety
text: New or severe breathing difficulty requires urgent medical care.

title: Severe Bleeding Safety
text: Severe bleeding is a medical emergency and needs immediate emergency response.

title: Mild Viral Symptoms
text: For mild symptoms like low-grade fever and body ache, hydration and rest may help, but consult a doctor if symptoms persist.

title: High Blood Sugar Follow-up
text: Elevated blood sugar values should be reviewed with a doctor for further assessment and management.

title: Low Blood Sugar Warning
text: Very low blood sugar may cause sweating, shakiness, and confusion and should be addressed urgently.

title: Dizziness and Fatigue
text: Persistent dizziness or unexplained fatigue should be evaluated by a qualified clinician.

title: Medication Safety Reminder
text: Do not start or stop prescription medication without consulting your doctor.

title: Leg Pain Guidance
text: Mild leg pain may have many causes. If pain is severe, persistent, associated with swelling, or affects walking, consult a doctor soon.

title: Shoulder Pain Guidance
text: Shoulder pain can be due to strain or inflammation. If pain is severe, limits movement, follows injury, or continues for several days, consult a doctor.

title: Hemoglobin Adult Female Range
text: Typical adult female hemoglobin reference range is approximately 12.0 to 15.5 g/dL.

title: Hemoglobin Adult Male Range
text: Typical adult male hemoglobin reference range is approximately 13.5 to 17.5 g/dL.

title: Fasting Glucose Normal
text: Fasting blood glucose below 100 mg/dL is generally considered normal in many labs.

title: Fasting Glucose Prediabetes
text: Fasting blood glucose from 100 to 125 mg/dL is often considered prediabetes range.

title: Fasting Glucose Diabetes Threshold
text: Fasting blood glucose at or above 126 mg/dL may indicate diabetes and should be clinically confirmed.

title: Random Glucose Alert
text: Random blood glucose at or above 200 mg/dL with symptoms may be clinically significant and needs medical evaluation.

title: HbA1c General Cutoffs
text: Common HbA1c interpretation: below 5.7 percent normal, 5.7 to 6.4 percent prediabetes, 6.5 percent or above diabetes range.

title: Reference Range Variation
text: Lab reference ranges can differ by instrument, method, age, sex, and local lab standards.
